title: 30-Day Dhammapada
description: Work through the Dhammapada one chapter per day — a beautiful introduction to the Dhamma

days.title: Chapter I: The Pairs
days.description: Mind is the forerunner of all actions.

days.title: Chapter II: Heedfulness
days.description: Heedfulness is the path to the deathless.

days.title: Chapter III: The Mind
days.description: The mind is hard to restrain, swift, and wanders where it will.

days.title: Chapter IV: Flowers
days.description: Who shall conquer this earth, this world of Yama?

days.title: Chapter V: The Fool
days.description: Long is the night for the wakeful; long is the league for the weary.

days.title: Chapter VI: The Wise
days.description: Were one to live a hundred years without wisdom and composure...

days.title: Chapter VII: The Arahant
days.description: One whose taints are destroyed, who is not attached to food...

days.title: Chapter VIII: Thousands
days.description: Better than a thousand hollow words is one meaningful word.

days.title: Chapter IX: Evil
days.description: Rush to do good, restrain your mind from evil.

days.title: Chapter X: The Rod
days.description: All tremble at the rod, all fear death.

days.title: Chapter XI: Old Age
days.description: Why is there laughter, why is there joy, when the world is always burning?

days.title: Chapter XII: The Self
days.description: If one holds oneself dear, one should protect oneself well.

days.title: Chapter XIII: The World
days.description: Don't follow a corrupt life, don't be negligent.

days.title: Chapter XIV: The Awakened One
days.description: One whose victory cannot be turned into defeat...

days.title: Chapter XV: Happiness
days.description: Happy indeed are we who live without hate among the hateful.

days.title: Chapter XVI: Affection
days.description: Give yourself to distraction and you miss your purpose.

days.title: Chapter XVII: Anger
days.description: Leave anger, abandon conceit.

days.title: Chapter XVIII: Impurities
days.description: You are like a yellowed leaf; death's minions are waiting for you.

days.title: Chapter XIX: The Just
days.description: Don't be hasty in judging others.

days.title: Chapter XX: The Path
days.description: The Eightfold Path is the best of paths.

days.title: Chapter XXI: Miscellaneous
days.description: If by forsaking a minor pleasure one sees a major pleasure...

days.title: Chapter XXII: Hell
days.description: Speakers of falsehood go to hell.

days.title: Chapter XXIII: The Elephant
days.description: As the elephant in battle endures arrows shot into it...

days.title: Chapter XXIV: Craving
days.description: The craving of a heedless person grows like a maluva creeper.

days.title: Chapter XXV: The Monk
days.description: Restraint of the eye is good; restraint of the ear is good.

days.title: Chapter XXVI: The Brahman
days.description: I call that person a brahman who has cut all fetters.

days.title: Satipaṭṭhāna Sutta
days.description: The direct path — foundations of mindfulness.

days.title: Setting the Wheel of Dhamma
days.description: The first discourse of the Buddha.

days.title: Lovingkindness
days.description: May all beings be happy and secure.

days.title: The Noble Search
days.description: The search for the unborn, the unaging, the undying.

title: Introduction to the MN
description: 10 key suttas from the Majjhima Nikāya — perfect for a first exploration
